# Third-party portfolio publication approval — draft

This is an operational template for counsel review. Do not place a signed copy
or personal signatory data in the public website repository.

- Rights holder / client:
- Registered details:

- Signatory capacity and authority:
- Aetheris entity: Aetheris Solutions S.r.l., operating through Aetheris Studio
- Underlying contract / project reference:
- Approval date:

## Exact material

Attach a contact sheet and list every approved item. Use the public asset and
claim IDs from `docs/PROOF-ASSETS.md`.

| Asset / claim ID | Filename or screenshot | SHA-256 | What is visible | Approved |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| — | — | — | — | yes / no |

## Approval scope

The rights holder confirms, only for the items marked approved:

- Aetheris may identify the rights holder/client and describe the agreed
  project scope in its website, portfolio, proposals, awards submissions and
  owned social channels: yes / no / limitations;
- the specified names, marks, storefronts, interfaces, dashboards, product
  creative and screenshots may be reproduced: yes / no / limitations;
- the exact claims, KPI values, time windows and methodology listed above may
  be published: yes / no / limitations;
- account IDs, tenant names, queue content, product names and operational
  metrics visible in a screenshot are approved or must be redacted as follows:
- Aetheris may crop, resize, compress, translate, caption, mask or redact the
  approved material without changing its meaning: yes / no / limitations;
- permitted channels:
- territory:
- start date and term:
- required attribution:
- review-before-publication requirement:
- withdrawal, expiry and takedown procedure:

## Third-party rights and confidentiality

The rights holder states:

- it owns the approved material or has authority to grant the permissions
  above, including any relevant retailer, upstream-brand, platform or campaign
  rights: yes / no / exceptions;
- publication does not breach an NDA, platform term, embargo or confidentiality
  obligation: yes / no / exceptions;
- photographer, videographer, designer, talent and identifiable-person rights
  are cleared for the stated use: yes / no / attach separate evidence;
- any personal, customer, employee, account, payment, credential or other
  confidential data that must be removed is listed here:
- any content requiring an upstream licensor's separate approval is listed
  here:

This approval does not validate claims that are not expressly listed and does
not transfer rights that the signatory does not control.
